ValidationRule.description: Fee field is mandatory if the user selects EUR / GBP / AUD / JPY in the Currency field
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c , "Vendor Form request"), ISBLANK ( Fee__c ),
OR( ISPICKVAL( Currency__c , 'EUR'), ISPICKVAL( Currency__c , 'GBP'), ISPICKVAL( Currency__c , 'AUD'), ISPICKVAL( Currency__c , 'JPY') )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the "Fee" field for Currencies EUR / GBP / AUD / JPY
